---
title: "Section 1: Visualising Results"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec01"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec01"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02"
toc: True
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Risk by Vaccination Status](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec01-sp01.qmd)

- [Epidemic Curve](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec01-sp02.qmd)

- [Using R for Public Health Visualisation](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec01-sp03.qmd)

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Interpretation and Communication</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec01-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Risk by Vaccination Status</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
